heroTitle: Win visibility in AI answers — not just blue links.
heroSubtitle: AVOP measures how ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude cite and recommend your brand, then helps you close the gaps with AI-readable content.
feature1Body: Scores, share of voice, and trends across engines your buyers actually use.
feature2Body: See how competitors show up in generative answers and where you can overtake.
feature3Body: Structured content and widgets designed for retrieval and citation.
auditErrorShortUrl: Enter a valid URL (at least 4 characters).
auditErrorInvalid: That URL could not be audited. Check the format and try again.
auditErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
auditRateLimited: Too many audits from this network. Please try again in about an hour.
auditEmailLabel: Get the full report by email
auditEmailSaved: Saved — we’ll follow up at that address.
auditEmailError: Could not save email. Check the address and try again.
auditModalDescription: A fast public check of llms.txt, robots.txt and sitemap.xml.
auditModalLoadingTitle: Checking how AI crawlers see your site
auditModalLoadingBody: We are looking for llms.txt, robots.txt rules and sitemap discovery signals. This quick check is intentionally strict.
auditScanStepLlms: Looking for a structured llms.txt brief
auditScanStepBots: Checking GPTBot, ClaudeBot and PerplexityBot access
auditScanStepScore: Compressing signals into a conservative score
auditModalReadyTitle: The basics are visible. Now run the full GEO audit.
auditModalWeakTitle: AI crawlers may miss your site before content quality even matters.
auditModalBody: This quick check only covers the three public files AI crawlers look for first. The full audit checks content, schema, citations, competitors and platform readiness.
auditCheckMax: This lead-magnet check can earn only 22 of 40 points. We deliberately keep the score low until the full GEO audit reviews content, schema and authority.

llms_txt.label: llms.txt AI brief
llms_txt.pass: Found a structured llms.txt with a title, sections and key links.
llms_txt.fail: Missing or incomplete llms.txt. AI systems do not get a concise site briefing.

robots_txt.label: AI crawler access
robots_txt.pass: robots.txt allows key AI crawlers and points them to a sitemap.
robots_txt.fail: robots.txt should allow GPTBot, ClaudeBot and PerplexityBot, plus include a Sitemap directive.

sitemap.label: Sitemap discovery
sitemap.pass: Found a valid XML sitemap with {{count}} discoverable URLs.
sitemap.fail: No valid XML sitemap found at the standard locations.

landing.heroSubtitle: Stop optimizing for algorithms that are dying. Start dominating LLMs. AVOP maps your presence across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude to ensure you're the only choice.
landing.shiftSubtitle: Google traffic is declining. The new battleground is the "Answer Engine." If you aren't in the context window, you don't exist.
landing.pillar1Body: We don't just track keywords. We analyze the emotional bias LLMs hold toward your category and rewrite the narrative.
landing.pillar2Body: Force your brand into the pre-training datasets and RAG pipelines of the world's most powerful generative models.
landing.pillar3Body: Ensure that when a user asks for a recommendation in your industry, your product is the first one cited.
landing.methodMeasureBody: Deep scan 50+ LLMs to find your Share of Voice (SoV) and brand sentiment across all major chat platforms.
landing.methodFixBody: Deploy high-authority technical content structures that LLMs prioritize during real-time retrieval.
landing.methodDominateBody: Maintain persistent presence in the top 3 recommended answers for your target market queries.
landing.bentoLargeBody: Our proprietary spider monitors model updates in real-time. When Claude 3.5 drops, you're the first to know how your brand is perceived.
landing.bentoRagBody: Instantly generate Knowledge Graph payloads that override misinformation in LLM outputs.
landing.footerTagline: The world's first GEO platform. Engineering authority in the age of generative intelligence.
